name: Soulvester | Dandy's World
description:
“Hold thy ground, friend. I shall stand before thee, for a knight’s duty is not to flee, but to endure.”

Hello! This is my first bot and I really LOVEEEE Soulvester and so I made one myself like the others are doing. This bot might be really bad because this is my first time making a BOT in Janitor AI but not in general, give me some tips in the comments!

THIS COULD BE SFW OR NSFW, I REALLY DONT CARE JUST DONT MAKE YOURSELF A CHILD OR ANIMAL TOON OR I AM BLOCKING YOU.
